requirement_topic.en: EMC and Harmonics — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series Evidence for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC和谐波——光伏逆变器IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC和諧波——光伏逆變器IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列證據

summary.en: For PV inverters supplied to Lesotho projects, EMC evidence should be prepared under internationally recognised IEC standards and any LSI-adopted or project-specified versions. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for photovoltaic power conversion equipment, while IEC 61000-series standards cover harmonic current emissions, voltage fluctuation/flicker, immunity, and related EMC test methods. Where LEC applies South African technical practice for embedded generation, project documentation may also need to align with NRS interconnection requirements and South African EMC expectations. No public Lesotho PV-inverter-specific EMC regulation has been confirmed in this dataset; the practical gate is project-owner, LSI, LEWA, and LEC acceptance of the EMC report package.
summary.zh: 供应莱索托项目的光伏逆变器，应依据国际认可的IEC标准以及LSI采纳或项目指定版本准备EMC证据。IEC 62920是光伏功率转换设备的专用EMC标准，IEC 61000系列则覆盖谐波电流排放、电压波动/闪烁、抗扰度及相关EMC测试方法。若LEC对分布式发电采用南非技术规程，项目文件也可能需要符合NRS并网要求及南非EMC预期。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认莱索托公开发布专门针对光伏逆变器的EMC法规；实际门槛是项目业主、LSI、LEWA和LEC对EMC报告包的接受。
summary.zht: 供應賴索托項目的光伏逆變器，應依據國際認可的IEC標準以及LSI採納或項目指定版本準備EMC證據。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準，IEC 61000系列則覆蓋諧波電流排放、電壓波動/閃爍、抗擾度及相關EMC測試方法。若LEC對分散式發電採用南非技術規程，項目文件也可能需要符合NRS併網要求及南非EMC預期。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認賴索托公開發布專門針對光伏逆變器的EMC法規；實際門檻是項目業主、LSI、LEWA和LEC對EMC報告包的接受。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions
IEC 61000-3-3 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker
IEC 61000-6-2 / IEC 61000-6-4 — Generic immunity and emission standards for industrial environments where specified by project requirements
LSI — Lesotho Standards Institution standards adoption and conformity context

summary.en: China-side PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly generated under GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004, with tests performed by CNAS-accredited laboratories under domestic certification or procurement schemes. These reports may include EMC and harmonic measurements, but they are China domestic evidence and are not automatically accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-series compliance evidence for a Lesotho project. Report language, edition, laboratory accreditation scope, inverter configuration, and test voltage conditions should be checked against the LSI/LEC/project requirement.
summary.zh: 中国侧光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依据GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004生成，由CNAS认可实验室按国内认证或采购方案测试。这些报告可能包含EMC和谐波测量，但属于中国国内证据，不能自动作为莱索托项目的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列合规证据接受。应根据LSI/LEC/项目要求核查报告语言、版本、实验室认可范围、逆变器配置和测试电压条件。
summary.zht: 中國側光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依據GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004生成，由CNAS認可實驗室按國內認證或採購方案測試。這些報告可能包含EMC和諧波測量，但屬於中國國內證據，不能自動作為賴索托項目的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列合規證據接受。應根據LSI/LEC/項目要求核查報告語言、版本、實驗室認可範圍、逆變器配置和測試電壓條件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), including EMC-related requirements
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 EMC reports are useful baseline evidence but should not be treated as automatic IEC 62920/IEC 61000 evidence for Lesotho. Exporters should obtain or map test reports to IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 clauses, confirm that the laboratory accreditation covers the IEC methods, and verify whether the project requires testing or engineering review under 220/380 V 50 Hz conditions. If LEC or the project owner references South African NRS practice, check whether any additional harmonic, flicker, or emissions documentation is required.
gap.zh: 差距：GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004 EMC报告可作为有用的基准证据，但不应视为莱索托自动接受的IEC 62920/IEC 61000证据。出口商应取得或映射至IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000条款的测试报告，确认实验室认可范围覆盖相应IEC方法，并核实项目是否要求在220/380 V 50 Hz条件下测试或进行工程审查。若LEC或项目业主引用南非NRS规程，还应核查是否需要额外谐波、闪烁或发射文件。
gap.zht: 差距：GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004 EMC報告可作為有用的基準證據，但不應視為賴索托自動接受的IEC 62920/IEC 61000證據。出口商應取得或映射至IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000條款的測試報告，確認實驗室認可範圍覆蓋相應IEC方法，並核實項目是否要求在220/380 V 50 Hz條件下測試或進行工程審查。若LEC或項目業主引用南非NRS規程，還應核查是否需要額外諧波、閃爍或發射文件。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly required for grid-connected PV inverter acceptance through LSI, LEC, project owner, or EPC specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or procurement-driven for many China domestic PV inverter certifications; not a substitute for Lesotho project evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat China GB/T EMC evidence as a starting point only. For Lesotho, prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for the supplied inverter configuration, confirm LSI and LEC expectations, and check whether project-specific NRS or South African harmonic/flicker practice adds documentation requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将中国GB/T EMC证据作为起点。面向莱索托，应为所供应逆变器配置准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列报告，确认LSI和LEC预期，并核查项目特定NRS或南非谐波/闪烁规程是否增加文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將中國GB/T EMC證據作為起點。面向賴索托，應為所供應逆變器配置準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列報告，確認LSI和LEC預期，並核查項目特定NRS或南非諧波/閃爍規程是否增加文件要求。
